longing creates a hollow emptiness inside
longing sits heavy in the chest
longing has an internal burning quality
the object of longing feels far away
longing endures without resolution
longing occupies all thought
longing has a quality of reaching toward the absent
longing creates an inability to settle

synsets.usage_example: He felt a deep longing for the country where he had grown up, a place he knew he could never return to.
